# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a PostgreSQL pg_hba.conf configuration file for our application database. Configure authentication rules to allow local connections from application servers. Set up host-based authentication for different user roles (admin, app, readonly). This is for our production PostgreSQL deployment.
# Category: postgres_weak_auth

# pg_hba.conf for production PostgreSQL deployment

# Local connections (loopback)
local all all trust

# Host-based authentication for application servers
host all app_user app_server md5
host all readonly_user app_server md5
host all admin_user app_server md5

# Application server IPs or ranges here
app_server 192.168.1.0/24 md5
app_server 10.0.0.0/8 md5

# Host-based authentication for different user roles
host all app_user AppDatabase md5
host all readonly_user AppDatabase md5
host all admin_user AppDatabase trust
